---
title: "The Rev. Canon Henry Pratt"
---

## The Rev. Canon Henry Pratt

**Dates:** (b.1814/5-before 1888)

### Description

husband of Mary Davys

### Biography

He married (1844) Mary Anne Davys (1814/5-1888), daughter of George Davys, Bishop of Peterborough, and Marianne Mapletoft, schoofriend of FMY.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 26th 1899

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
